research.title: Claude 5 Family Decision Framework: Fable 5 vs Opus 4.8 vs Sonnet 5 vs Haiku 4.5
research.whyTrending: Four active tiers with overlapping capabilities and 10x price spread. 'Which Claude model should I use' is an evergreen high-volume query that spiked after Fable 5 GA.

seo.suggestedTitle: Which Claude Model? Fable 5 vs Opus 4.8 vs Sonnet 5 vs Haiku

strategy.angle: Not a benchmark dump - a decision framework built on what actually differentiates tiers in production: API constraints, refusal surface, long-horizon coherence, and the 80/15/5 spend distribution
strategy.title: Which Claude Model? Fable 5 vs Opus 4.8 vs Sonnet 5 vs Haiku
strategy.excerpt: Four active Claude tiers, a 10x price spread, and API differences that break code between them. My decision framework after a month of running all four in production.
